sentences.arabic: يَنْشُرُ أَحْمَدُ صُوَرًا جَمِيلَةً عَلَى مَوْقِعِ إِنْسْتِغْرَام كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed svakodnevno objavljuje lijepe fotografije na Instagramu.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmad posts beautiful photos on Instagram every day.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ أَصْدِقَاؤُهُ التَّعْلِيقَ عَلَى صُوَرِهِ وَالتَّفَاعُلَ مَعَهَا.
sentences.translation: Njegovi prijatelji vole komentarisati njegove fotografije i komunicirati s njima.
sentences.translationEn: His friends love commenting on his photos and interacting with them.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَمْتِعُ أَحْمَدُ بِمُشَارَكَةِ لَحَظَاتِهِ السَّعِيدَةِ مَعَ الْآخَرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed uživa u dijeljenju svojih sretnih trenutaka s drugima.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmad enjoys sharing his happy moments with others.
